title: Verify Happy Path: User sets a reminder via Trial Corner to avoid cancellation
description: Tests that a user in the target cohort sees the widget, navigates to the Trial Corner, and successfully enables the 'Remind me' toggle.
preconditions: User has not watched any content within the first 5 minutes of the trial starting.
User is on Day 0 or Day 1 of the trial.

steps.description: 1. Log in and navigate to the Homepage.
2. Observe the persistent 'Trial Mode' widget in the header.
3. Click on the 'Manage Control Center' link in the widget.
4. Verify redirection to the 'Trial Corner' hub.
6. Click the toggle for 'Remind me 24h before trial ends'.
7. Observe a confirmation message that the reminder is set.

expected_result: The reminder toggle should be in the 'ON' state. The user's trial remains active. The 'remind-me-clicked' event is triggered with 'trial corner' as the page source.
